description: Primary wave-112 move (WAR-14 multi-attach to liliana-vess) was already landed by a prior pass — both card frontmatter (WAR-14 characters: [gideon-jura, liliana-vess]) and node-side appears_on + body inline-citation are in place. Audit caught the actual remaining drift: two caveat bullets in liliana-vess.md documented in-flight work ('is being updated as part of this Mr. Nodeley pass' / 'Updated as part of this pass') that has shipped. Caveats rewritten as steady-state observations. Despark side spot-checked clean (characters: [nicol-bolas, liliana-vess] present). Comic-Book-Guy verdict: worst pending move ever — it had already happened. Rigor-audit caught the stale prose nobody else was looking at.
other_candidates_considered: gideon-jura rigor audit (deferred — node clean on spot-check; no drift artifacts found in 5-min scan of caveat block and appears_on)
